title: 2PCS Kitchen Grater, Cheese Grater Fine Grater with Handle Stainless Steel Blade for Chocolate, Cheese, Carrot, Ginger, Coconut, Nuts
features: - Versatile kitchen tool: This set of 2 graters offers different thickness options to meet various daily needs, from grating Parmesan cheese to zesting lemon and citrus fruits with ease and speed.
- Hygienic one-piece design: The grater features a seamless one-piece design made of stainless steel, which minimizes bacteria buildup and ensures easy cleaning, safe for dishwasher use.
- Sharp and safe: The razor-sharp stainless steel blade of the grater allows for effortless grating, while the smooth edges prevent hand scratches during use.
- Easy to clean: Simply rinse the grater with water after use for quick and convenient cleaning, with no gaps or residues to harbor bacteria.
- Multipurpose use: Ideal for grating chocolate, cheese, carrots, ginger, coconut, nuts, and more, making it a versatile tool in any kitchen.
description: Features include: - Multi-function kitchenware: Two graters of different thicknesses to meet daily grating needs. - One-piece design: Easy to clean stainless steel material that is dishwasher safe and resistant to bacteria growth. - Exquisite workmanship: Sharp blades with smooth edges for safe and comfortable use. - Easy to clean: Rinse with water after use for quick and convenient cleaning.
